2606.21474.title: Towards Transparent Mental Health Insights: An Explainable AI Model for Career-Related Depression and Anxiety Among University Students Using Structured Data
2606.21474.paper_summary: Career anxiety and depression among university students present a growing challenge to mental health and academic achievement. This study proposes an Explainable AI (XAI) framework using multimodal data and Federated Learning (FL) to identify early indicators of career-related mental health problems in a privacy-preserving and culturally responsive manner. The framework combines structured behavioral data and facial emotion features from interview videos via an intermediate fusion neural network with attention mechanisms. Label smoothing was applied to improve model generalizability. FL was used across institutions to enable collaborative training without raw data sharing. Evaluation was conducted using the Student Mental Health Survey dataset from university students across Pakistan. Our model attained an F1-score of 89.12%, recall of 86.54%, accuracy of 92.08%, and precision of 91.88%. Using Integrated Gradients and SHAP, the model identified key behavioral markers of depression including avoidance of direct gaze, lower facial expressiveness, and social withdrawal, consistent with psychological theory. This research presents an interpretable, scalable, and context-sensitive AI system for mental health pre-diagnosis with potential integration into student support services globally.
2606.21474.paper_summary_zh: 大學學生的職業焦慮和抑鬱症對心理健康和學業成就構成了日益嚴峻的挑戰。這項研究提出了一個可解釋的人工智慧（XAI）框架，利用多模態數據和聯邦學習（FL）來識別職業相關心理健康問題的早期指標，並以保護隱私和文化響應的方式進行。該框架結合了結構化行為數據和來自面試視頻的面部情感特徵，通過具有注意機制的中間融合神經網絡進行處理。應用了標籤平滑技術以提高模型的泛化能力。FL被用於不同機構之間，以實現無需共享原始數據的協作訓練。評估使用了來自巴基斯坦大學學生的學生心理健康調查數據集。我們的模型達到了89.12%的F1分數、86.54%的召回率、92.08%的準確率和91.88%的精確率。通過使用集成梯度和SHAP，該模型識別了抑鬱症的關鍵行為標記，包括避免直接目光接觸、面部表情較低和社交撤退，這與心理學理論一致。這項研究提出了一個可解釋的、可擴展的和情境敏感的人工智慧系統，用於心理健康的預診斷，並有潛力整合到全球學生支持服務中。
2606.21474.author: Arsham Azam et.al.
2606.21474.authors: Arsham Azam, Rasikh Ali, Tayyaba Farhat, Sheeraz Akram
